title: Mid-Level Business Development Manager at Navin's

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Business Development Manager at Navin's
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Navin's. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Business Development Manager to strengthen our Agra-based team.

About Navin's:
Navin's is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Navin's!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
